reviews.review_title: The game is good but it could be better.
reviews.review_description: It would be a lot of fun if there were missions like deer hunter in this game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Mubs.Khan,

Thank you for your feedback! We're so glad you enjoy the game. You'll be happy to know that missions similar to Deer Hunter are already in the works! We're excited to bring this feature to life in an upcoming update, so stay tuned for more exciting gameplay. If you have any other suggestions, we'd love to hear them!

reviews.review_description: I wasn't sure what to expect at first, but this hunting game turned out to be incredibly fun and addictive. From the moment I put the headset on, I felt fully transported into the jungle. The environments are stunningly detailed and so immersive that I could spend hours just exploring. And the gameplay? It's a blast! The mechanics are smooth, and there's a real satisfaction in lining up the perfect sniper shot. I find myself coming back again and again, just to see how far I can push my skills to set a high shooting score. If you're into VR, I recommend this game!

developer_response.body:
Hi faizan_gamer,
Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your positive experience with our game! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the immersive environments and thrilling gameplay and your feedback encourages us to keep improving.

Happy hunting, and thank you for being a part of our community!

reviews.review_description: It has horrible graphics and just not a great game overall could be fun for a younger gamer but still bad

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet your expectations. Improving the graphics and overall gameplay experience is a top priority for us, and we’re actively working on updates to enhance the game for players of all ages.

We value input like yours as it helps us grow and create better experiences. If you have specific suggestions or features you’d like to see, please share them—we’d love to hear more from you!

reviews.review_description: One of the worst games I have ever played trust me don’t play it

developer_response.body:
Hi Kmarshall0430,
We’re sorry it didn’t meet your expectations. If there’s anything specific you’d like to see improved, we’d love to hear it. Your ideas could help us make the game better for everyone
